# Pulse HR

> The HR & payroll platform for teams of 5–500. Unified payroll, time tracking, leave, recruiting, onboarding and kudos in one workspace. Multi-country payroll (US, UK, IT, ES, FR, DE, IE, NL natively), AI Copilot, keyboard-first, PWA-ready. Free for the first 5 employees.

## Overview
- [Product tour](https://pulsehr.com/product) — Nine products that feel like one: payroll, time, leave, recruiting, onboarding, documents, saturation, Copilot, growth.
- [Labs features](https://pulsehr.com/labs) — Team Pulse (sentiment), Commessa Forecast (AI scenario planning), Kudos (peer recognition), Focus Mode (deep work), Saturation (utilization).
- [Changelog](https://pulsehr.com/changelog) — Reverse-chronological product updates.
- [Pricing](https://pulsehr.com/pricing) — One transparent tier per active employee per month. Free up to 5 employees.
- [Security](https://pulsehr.com/security) — SOC 2 Type II, GDPR-compliant, EU data residency, ISO 27001 in progress.
- [API reference](https://pulsehr.com/docs/api) — REST API, webhooks on every resource, SDKs for TypeScript, Python, Go.

## Concepts
- **Commessa-first** — Every hour, expense and headcount dollar traces to a project (commessa is Italian for a billable job code). Matches how finance sees the company.
- **One surface** — Replaces Deel, Rippling, and a dozen Google Docs. ⌘K opens search from anywhere.
- **Workflows not forms** — Leave, expenses, onboarding are structured workflows with owners, deadlines and automation, not forms landing in a shared inbox.
- **Open by default** — Export anything. Webhooks on every event. Public API with versioned contracts.

## Copilot (AI)
⌘J opens a streaming natural-language Copilot. Prompts are scoped to the current user's permissions only. No cross-tenant training. Can be disabled per role or org-wide, or routed through a private Azure OpenAI tenant.

## Offline (PWA)
Installs as a PWA on macOS, Windows, iOS, Android. Recent views, timesheets and kudos drafts work offline and sync on reconnect. Payroll runs require a live connection and queue if offline.

## Contact

- Status: https://status.pulsehr.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/pulsehr
